arts.ttl: Man Utd legend Denis Law dies aged 84
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Denis Law has died at the age of 84, his family have announced. "Everyone at Manchester United is mourning the loss of Denis Law, the King of the Stretford End, who has passed away, aged 84," a statement from the Red Devils read.

arts.ttl: Micah Richards broke 'golden rule of punditry' to pull up Man Utd star while on TV
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Some of Micah Richards' former team-mates are still playing football today, but that does not mean the former Manchester City, Aston Villa and England defender goes easy on them

arts.ttl: Man United v Brighton: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Man United v Brighton: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho transfer twist as Napoli reach conclusion after Man Utd talks
arts.sum: Manchester United wide man Alejandro Garnacho could find himself on the move in January, but Serie A side Napoli aren't the only side to express an interest in the Argentine

arts.ttl: Ipswich win should give Brighton belief - Hurzeler
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion head coach Fabian Hurzeler believes his side 'deserved' all three points after securing their first win in eight matches against Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Man United continue to reject Napoli approaches for Alejandro Garnacho - but the Italian giants have not given up yet with the player open to move
arts.sum: Napoli, though, are not thought to have officially walked away from a deal; it is believed that the player would be open to a move, with cost of a deal the stumbling block.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Ruben Amorim 'concedes defeat' in 24-year-old race as 'small gap' revealed
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are reportedly close to tying Manchester United and Real Madrid-linked defender Alphonso Davies down to a new contract.

arts.ttl: Denis Law dies aged 84 - Tributes paid to Manchester United legend
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Amie Wilson, Matty Hewitt, Richard Garnett)
arts.sum: Tributes are flooding in from the football world following the passing of Manchester United legend Denis Law, aged 84

arts.ttl: Man United supporters pay tribute to Denis Law outside Old Trafford - as fans lay scarves and flowers by his statue after his death aged 84
arts.sum: Following the news of his passing on Friday evening, fans flocked to Old Trafford to lay flowers, scarves and other memorial items by the United Trinity statue and pay their tributes to the United icon.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney and Gary Neville lead Man Utd tributes to Denis Law after his death
arts.sum: Tributes have been flooding in after Denis Law, part of Manchester United's 'Holy Trinity', a Ballon d'Or and European Cup winner and Scotlands joint all-time leading goalscorer, died on Friday at the age of 84
